task_objective: Land the lunar module safely between the flags, with minimal horizontal offset, low speed, upright orientation, and gentle touchdown without bouncing or crashing.

component_blueprint.name: r_center_guidance
component_blueprint.description: Reward for proximity to landing pad center (|x| ≤ 0.2).

component_blueprint.name: r_stability
component_blueprint.description: Penalize tilt angle and angular velocity.

component_blueprint.name: r_vertical_safety
component_blueprint.description: Penalize high downward speed when near ground (y < 0.5).

component_blueprint.name: r_fuel_penalty
component_blueprint.description: Small penalty for using main and side engines.

anti_exploit_principles: Discourage hovering by penalizing fuel usage and rewarding progress toward center.
Prevent bouncing by requiring sustained ground contact for terminal success.
Penalize crashing with negative sparse reward.
